description: Native multi-file open picker for `cs upload`. Granted to LOCALLY-served SPA windows (workspace-*, terminal-*, local::<window_id> watcher-opened workspace windows) and to the user's own devserver/tunnel windows (lib-*, a registry-configured devserver reached at loopback over an ssh -L / chan tunnel — the loopback remote.urls below scope it to that case). Excludes outbound-* (ad-hoc remote-URL attach): this command pops a native open panel and reads the chosen files' bytes off the local disk, so it stays off untrusted remote-served webviews. The picker is user-interactive (the user picks the files) and `cs upload` is a user-initiated terminal command, so a static grant to registry-configured tunnel windows is acceptable this round; a per-gesture handshake ACL is the follow-up. Mirrors the local-drop scope plus lib-*.
